ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_desc" TEXT /* Description of the sample */,
  "strain" TEXT /* Strain of the sample */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the sample */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the sample */,
  "input_type" TEXT /* Type of input data (e.g., assembly, Illumina paired-end) */,
  "trim" TEXT /* Whether the data has been trimmed */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the sample was collected */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the sample belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sample was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sample was last updated */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date and time the sample was collected */,
  "isolation_source" TEXT /* Source from which the sample was isolated */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude and longitude) where the sample was collected */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the sample */,
  "public_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the sample data is publicly accessible */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Physical location where the sample is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the site */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the site */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the site director */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of project completion */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* List of collaborating institutions or researchers */,
  "publications" TEXT /* List of publications resulting from the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_types" (
  "input_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input type */,
  "input_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the input type (e.g., assembly, Illumina paired-end) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the input type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the sample the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., fna, fastq) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Detailed format of the file */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the file, if applicable */,
  "encryption_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the file is encrypted */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the file has been downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the sample the metadata belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., isolation_source, latitude) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., biological, technical) */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata (e.g., lab notes, public database) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions for the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access (e.g., in seconds) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the data (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the sample the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotated_by" TEXT /* User who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., biological, technical, administrative) */,
  "annotation_source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., lab notes, external review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the sample the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_creator" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "version_changes" TEXT /* Detailed changes made in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_processing_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data processing step */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the sample the step belongs to */,
  "step_name" TEXT /* Name of the processing step */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Description of the processing step */,
  "step_date" TEXT /* Date and time the step was executed */,
  "step_output" TEXT /* Output of the processing step */,
  "step_status" TEXT /* Status of the processing step (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "step_tool" TEXT /* Tool or software used for the processing step */,
  "step_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used during the processing step */,
  "step_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the processing step (e.g., in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_processing_steps_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)
